projectBacklogEmpty: Drag tasks here from the backlog
processQ2: Will it take less than 2 minutes?
processQ4: Is this part of a project?
processReferenceHint: Save this somewhere you'll find it — a local folder, Notion, or your notes app. Once saved, mark it done.
processClarifyHint: The title should be a concrete, physical action — start with a verb (e.g. "Call", "Write", "Buy").
projectCompleteText: This will mark the project and {{count}} remaining task(s) as done.
projectNoNextAction: "{{name}}" has no next action — add one to keep it moving.
processNewProjectHint: The name should describe the outcome you're aiming for, not a physical action — e.g. "Website launched" or "Report submitted" (Getting Things Done).
processShoppingListHint: Enter the name of the item you need to buy.
processDelegateHint: Add the person's name in the notes so you know who to follow up with.
